name: Matt Wilson
abstract: Matthew Edward Wilson (born September 27, 1964) is an American jazz drummer.

concerts.label: Boston Pops Orchestra
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Lee Konitz 80th Birthday Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Denny Zeitlin
about_quotes.evidence: I’ve got a number of trio performances coming up in the next year, most of them will be with Buster Williams on bass and Matt Wilson on drums.
about_quotes.doc_title: Denny Zeitlin interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Francisco, California, August 8, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Peter Erskine
about_quotes.evidence: Adam Nussbaum said something yesterday, he said, “You know you can’t have the fire without the air.” Or maybe that was Matt Wilson. I forget. Matt Wilson gave a great class yesterday.
about_quotes.doc_title: Peter Erskine interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Orleans, Louisiana, January 9, 2020

about_quotes.speaker: Rufus Reid
about_quotes.evidence: Matt Wilson had a wonderful workshop yesterday and I advocated also...
about_quotes.doc_title: Rufus Reid interviewed by Monk Rowe, Atlanta, GA, January 4, 2013
